demos.name: Context Split Planner
demos.tagline: Deterministic planner that decides when to split a long AI coding task into a fresh session, a subagent, or a human handoff.
demos.audience: PMs, leads, and AI coding teams splitting big tasks across sessions
demos.problem: Long agent sessions lose context and handoff discipline, so teams need a deterministic split plan before the work drifts.
validation: validate/build passed
desktop/mobile browser smoke passed
copy fallback and storage-off verified

demos.name: AGENTS.md Coverage Radar
demos.tagline: Deterministic instruction coverage scanner that maps repo signals to owners, coverage gaps, and the next action checklist.
demos.audience: AI product PMs, engineering leads, QA owners, and platform teams shipping agent workflows
demos.problem: Teams have instruction sources, coverage inventories, owners, and rollout risk, but they lack a quick way to turn them into a readable coverage matrix and action brief before the next change.
validation: Built and smoke-tested locally
deterministic coverage brief and Markdown export verified
copy fallback and storage-disabled states testable
desktop and 375px mobile no overflow

demos.name: MergePulse
demos.tagline: Deterministic PR merge readiness radar that turns code changes into a risk matrix, owner map, and merge checklist.
demos.audience: PMs, engineering leads, QA owners, and platform teams shipping PRs fast
demos.problem: Teams need a quick way to see which pull requests are risky, who owns the risky items, and what checklist to run before merge.
validation: Isolated demo implemented and locally runnable
deterministic merge brief and Markdown export verified
copy fallback and storage-disabled states testable
UI responsive at 375px and desktop

demos.name: Workspace Agent Route Planner

demos.audience: AI product leads, engineering managers, and ops owners adopting workspace agents

responsive at 375px and desktop

demos.name: AgentGate
demos.tagline: ROI, permissions, approvals, and audit-ready launch brief for AI agents.
demos.audience: 20-500 人公司的创始人、运营负责人、RevOps、Customer Ops、Finance Ops
demos.problem: 团队想让 AI agent 执行 CRM、客服、财务等重复流程，但缺少 ROI、权限、审批和审计的上线前评估。
monetization: Free：基础 Agent Launch Brief 可复制和 Markdown 导出。
Pro：多 workflow 历史、模板库和顾问版导出。
Consultant / Service pack：白标报告、多客户 workspace 和 5-flow audit。
validation: 已实现本地可运行 MVP 并完成增量报告能力。
覆盖 Copy brief、Markdown export、升级提示和顾问版报告文案。
覆盖真实 agent use-case seed、低/中/高风险、权限矩阵、localStorage recovery。
